reason: Defines the required LMDB/Bleve store stack and says GlobalSystem.Store/KVStore/Hints must be persistent.
Defines AppContext and GlobalSystem integration contract, including shared Pool and persistent sdk.System dependencies.
Explains sdk.System ownership boundaries and local-store-first behavior so wiring changes stay aligned with the forked SDK design.
Documents that FetchEventsByFilter and middleware rely on sdk.System store and KVStore behavior, which this wiring fix must preserve.
This fix crosses config initialization, sdk.System, and persistent storage boundaries; use it to verify contracts at each boundary.
Helps avoid duplicating persistent initialization logic and keeps GlobalSystem wiring centralized.
